overall.description: A first-person exploration of a traditional Southeast Asian stilt village in a game engine, featuring wooden walkways, canals, and thatched-roof houses. The player character walks through the village, crosses bridges, explores the waterfront, and enters a building interior.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wooden walkway elevated over a calm canal, surrounded by dense bamboo and traditional stilt houses with ornate thatched roofs. The camera approaches and begins climbing a steep wooden staircase toward an upper level of the village.

segments.scene_description: Moving through the upper village level on wooden walkways lined with bamboo railings, passing by thatched-roof stilt houses. Villagers are seen sitting and standing near the buildings as the camera progresses through the settlement.

segments.scene_description: At the waterfront dock level, looking out over the calm canal water at traditional stilt houses on the opposite bank. A villager sits on the dock edge while another is visible through an open window, and a wooden arch bridge spans the water in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open canal with stilt houses on both sides

segments.scene_description: A panoramic view of the village canal, showing multiple traditional stilt houses with ornate roofs reflected in the water. The camera slowly pans to reveal the extent of the wooden architecture, a large central tree, and lush vegetation surrounding the waterway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway leading to building interior

events.description: enters dark interior of wooden building

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway and entering a wooden building interior

notable_agents.action: standing against wall near building entrance

entered.detail: dark open doorway of wooden building with woven bamboo walls
dimly lit interior room with wooden furniture and curtains

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated wooden walkway toward a building entrance, passing a villager standing against the wall. The camera enters the dark interior of the wooden structure, transitioning from the bright outdoor village to a dimly lit room with visible furniture and woven bamboo walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a traditional stilt village, moving from the canal-side walkways up into the settlement and finally into a dim interior. It begins along an elevated wooden path beside a calm canal and dense bamboo before climbing a steep staircase toward the upper village level. As the camera progresses through this higher tier, it passes bamboo railings and villagers gathered near thatched-roof houses, eventually descending to a waterfront dock that overlooks the opposite bank and a distant wooden arch bridge. The scene then expands into a panoramic view of the ornate architecture and a large central tree reflected in the water, before turning back toward the walkways. Finally, the camera passes a villager standing by a wall and crosses the threshold of a wooden building, transitioning from the bright outdoor light into a dimly lit room with woven bamboo walls.
